specific_question: How many franchised dealerships comprised Elexion Automotive's North American network in 2024?
answer: Elexion Automotive operated through a network of 127 franchise dealerships in the U.S. and Canada as of November 2024.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
